hero.description: Zanix connects travelers, diaspora, and locals with verified car rental providers in Douala and Yaoundé. No stress, no middlemen, no surprises.

about.heading: Built for Cameroon,
about.paragraph1: Car rental in Cameroon runs on WhatsApp, personal contacts, and luck. No transparency, no guarantees, no structure. Travelers arrive hoping for the best.
about.paragraph2: Zanix organises this into a single trusted platform. Verified providers, transparent pricing, and pre-arrival confirmation — so you can land with confidence.

cards.title: Launching First In
cards.body: Douala and Yaoundé — Cameroon's two largest cities and economic hubs.

cards.title: Focused On
cards.body: Airport pickups, arriving travelers, and diaspora visitors who need reliability.

cards.title: For Everyone
cards.body: Tourists, business travelers, and locals who want a documented rental experience.

cards.title: Core Promise
cards.body: Verified Providers, Transparent Pricing, Pre-Arrival Lock-in.

cards.title: The Reality
cards.body: The demand and supply is real — the structure and trust are missing. We bring both to Cameroon.

how_it_works.heading: From search to keys in hand

steps.title: Search
steps.description: Browse verified vehicles in Douala or Yaoundé. Filter by type, price, and pickup location.

steps.title: Request
steps.description: Send a booking request before you land. Choose your dates and preferred pickup point.

steps.title: Confirm
steps.description: Vendor approves within 24 hrs. Pay securely via MTN MoMo or Orange Money.

steps.title: Drive
steps.description: Arrive, collect your car, drive. Fully confirmed — zero surprises. Leave a review when done.

features.heading: Everything you need, nothing you don't

cards.label: Verified Vendors
cards.description: Identity-checked and document-verified before going live.

cards.label: WhatsApp Integration
cards.description: Customers can still contact vendors via WhatsApp, now with a verified layer.

cards.label: Mobile Money Payments
cards.description: Pay with MTN MoMo or Orange Money. No card required.

cards.label: Pre-Arrival Booking
cards.description: Lock in your car from anywhere before you land.

cards.label: Reviews & Reputation
cards.description: Two-sided reviews build accountability for both customers and vendors.

cards.label: Driver Add-ons
cards.description: Phase 2: driver services, long-term rentals, insurance partnerships, more cities.

cities.heading: Starting where it matters most

douala.name: Douala
douala.description: Cameroon's economic capital and busiest port. Highest concentration of business travelers, diaspora returnees, and international arrivals.

yaounde.name: Yaoundé
yaounde.description: The political capital. Nsimalen International connects government officials, NGO workers, and business visitors.

cities.more_cities: More cities across Central & West Africa — Phase 3

waitlist.heading: Get Early Access
waitlist.description: Be the first to know when Zanix goes live. Vendors get priority placement. Customers get first-mover pricing.
waitlist.no_spam: No spam · We'll notify you when we launch in your city
waitlist.success_douala: We'll notify you when Zanix launches in Douala.
waitlist.success_yaounde: We'll notify you when Zanix launches in Yaoundé.
waitlist.success_other: We'll notify you when Zanix comes to your city.
waitlist.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
waitlist.error_rate_limit: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
waitlist.count_label: Join {count} others already on the waitlist

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1_body: When you join the Zanix waitlist, we collect your email address, user type (customer or vendor), and city. We also store a hashed (non-reversible) version of your IP address for security purposes only.
privacy.s2_body: We use your email solely to notify you when Zanix launches in your city. We do not sell, share, or use your data for advertising. We do not use cookies or tracking pixels.
privacy.s3_body: We use Plausible Analytics — a privacy-first, cookieless analytics tool. No personal data is collected. No consent banner is required.
privacy.s4_body: You may request deletion of your data at any time by emailing hello@zanix.cm. We will remove your record within 72 hours.
privacy.s5_body: Your data is stored securely on Supabase infrastructure in the EU West region. All data is encrypted at rest and in transit.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1_body: By joining the Zanix waitlist, you agree to receive a single notification email when Zanix launches in your city. You may unsubscribe at any time by replying to any email or contacting us at hello@zanix.cm.
terms.s2_body: Zanix is currently in pre-launch. Joining the waitlist does not guarantee access to the platform, a specific launch date, or any pricing. We reserve the right to modify or cancel the service at any time.
terms.s3_body: You agree not to submit false information, abuse the waitlist system, or attempt to interfere with the platform in any way.
terms.s4_body: All content, branding, and design on this site is the property of Zanix. You may not reproduce or distribute it without written permission.
terms.s5_body: These terms are governed by the laws of Cameroon. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of Douala, Cameroon.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: We're a small team building something meaningful for Cameroon. Reach out — we read every message.
